mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FILTER ( WHERE e.deleted_at IS NULL AND e.event_type = 'side' AND e.status = 'pending_approval' ) AS pending_event_approval_count ,COUNT(*) FILTER ( WHERE e.deleted_at IS NULL ) AS registered_event_count ,COUNT(*) FILTER ( WHERE e.deleted_at IS NULL AND e.event_type = 'main' ) AS official_event_count ,COUNT(*) FILTER ( WHERE e.deleted_at IS NULL AND e.event_type = 'side' ) AS side_event_count ,( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM event.event_participants ep WHERE ep.status = 'registered' ) AS total_participant_count ,( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM event.event_participants ep WHERE ep.status = 'registered' AND ep.registered_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days' ) AS recent_participant_count ,( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM event.users u WHERE u.deleted_at IS NULL AND u.user_type = 'organization' AND u.status = 'pending' ) AS pending_organization_approval_count FROM event.events e

SELECT e.event_seq ,e.title ,e.event_type ,e.status ,e.start_at AS start_at ,GREATEST(0, (e.start_at::date - CURRENT_DATE))::int AS days_until_event FROM event.events e WHERE e.deleted_at IS NULL AND e.start_at IS NOT NULL AND e.start_at::date >= CURRENT_DATE AND e.status IN ('published', 'pending_approval') ORDER BY e.start_at ASC, e.event_seq ASC LIMIT 5

SELECT e.event_seq ,e.title ,o.name AS organization_name ,e.start_at AS start_at ,e.venue_name ,e.max_participants ,e.created_at AS submitted_at FROM event.events e LEFT JOIN event.organizations o ON o.organization_seq = e.organization_seq WHERE e.deleted_at IS NULL AND e.event_type = 'side' AND e.status = 'pending_approval' ORDER BY e.created_at DESC NULLS LAST, e.event_seq DESC LIMIT 3

SELECT activity_type, actor_name, target_title, activity_at, reference_seq FROM ( SELECT 'side_event_submitted' AS activity_type ,COALESCE(o.name, 'Unknown Organization') AS actor_name ,e.title AS target_title ,e.created_at AS activity_at ,e.event_seq AS reference_seq FROM event.events e LEFT JOIN event.organizations o ON o.organization_seq = e.organization_seq WHERE e.deleted_at IS NULL AND e.event_type = 'side' AND e.created_at IS NOT NULL
UNION ALL
SELECT 'participant_registered' AS activity_type ,COALESCE( NULLIF(TRIM(CONCAT_WS(' ', p.first_name, NULLIF(p.middle_name, ''), p.last_name)), ''), 'Anonymous' ) AS actor_name ,ev.title AS target_title ,ep.registered_at AS activity_at ,ev.event_seq AS reference_seq FROM event.event_participants ep JOIN event.participants p ON p.participant_seq = ep.participant_seq JOIN event.events ev ON ev.event_seq = ep.event_seq WHERE ep.status = 'registered' AND ev.deleted_at IS NULL AND ep.registered_at IS NOT NULL
UNION ALL
SELECT 'org_signup_pending' AS activity_type ,COALESCE(o.name, u.name, 'Pending Organization') AS actor_name ,NULL AS target_title ,u.created_at AS activity_at ,u.user_seq AS reference_seq FROM event.users u LEFT JOIN event.organization_members om ON om.user_seq = u.user_seq LEFT JOIN event.organizations o ON o.organization_seq = om.organization_seq WHERE u.deleted_at IS NULL AND u.user_type = 'organization' AND u.status = 'pending' AND u.created_at IS NOT NULL ) AS activities ORDER BY activity_at DESC NULLS LAST LIMIT 10
SELECT organization_seq FROM event.organization_members WHERE user_seq = #{userSeq} LIMIT 1

SELECT COUNT(*) FILTER ( WHERE e.deleted_at IS NULL ) AS my_event_count ,COUNT(*) FILTER ( WHERE e.deleted_at IS NULL AND e.status = 'pending_approval' ) AS pending_approval_count ,COUNT(*) FILTER ( WHERE e.deleted_at IS NULL AND e.status = 'published' ) AS published_event_count ,COUNT(*) FILTER ( WHERE e.deleted_at IS NULL AND e.status = 'draft' ) AS draft_event_count ,COUNT(*) FILTER ( WHERE e.deleted_at IS NULL AND e.status = 'rejected' ) AS rejected_event_count ,( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM event.event_participants ep JOIN event.events ev ON ev.event_seq = ep.event_seq WHERE ev.organization_seq = #{organizationSeq} AND ev.deleted_at IS NULL AND ep.status = 'registered' ) AS total_applicant_count ,COALESCE(SUM(e.max_participants) FILTER ( WHERE e.deleted_at IS NULL AND e.max_participants IS NOT NULL ), 0) AS total_capacity_count FROM event.events e WHERE e.organization_seq = #{organizationSeq}

SELECT e.event_seq ,e.slug ,e.title ,e.event_type ,e.status ,e.start_at AS start_at ,e.end_at AS end_at ,e.registration_start_at AS registration_start_at ,e.registration_end_at AS registration_end_at ,e.venue_name ,e.max_participants ,COALESCE(rc.registration_count, 0) AS registration_count ,CASE WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM event.event_pages epg WHERE epg.event_seq = e.event_seq AND epg.deleted_at IS NULL AND epg.use_yn = 'Y' AND epg.page_status = 'published' ) THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS page_published_yn FROM event.events e LEFT JOIN ( SELECT event_seq, COUNT(*) AS registration_count FROM event.event_participants WHERE status = 'registered' GROUP BY event_seq ) rc ON rc.event_seq = e.event_seq WHERE e.organization_seq = #{organizationSeq} AND e.deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY e.start_at DESC NULLS LAST, e.event_seq DESC LIMIT 10

SELECT action_type, severity, event_seq, title, description, due_at FROM ( SELECT 'approval_pending' AS action_type ,'warning' AS severity ,e.event_seq ,e.title ,'Waiting for KCAB review.' AS description ,e.created_at AS due_at ,1 AS sort_order FROM event.events e WHERE e.organization_seq = #{organizationSeq} AND e.deleted_at IS NULL AND e.status = 'pending_approval'
UNION ALL
SELECT 'rejected' AS action_type ,'danger' AS severity ,e.event_seq ,e.title ,COALESCE(NULLIF(e.rejection_reason, ''), 'Review the rejection reason and resubmit.') AS description ,e.updated_at AS due_at ,2 AS sort_order FROM event.events e WHERE e.organization_seq = #{organizationSeq} AND e.deleted_at IS NULL AND e.status = 'rejected'
UNION ALL
SELECT 'event_soon' AS action_type ,'info' AS severity ,e.event_seq ,e.title ,'Event starts soon. Check participants and venue details.' AS description ,e.start_at AS due_at ,3 AS sort_order FROM event.events e WHERE e.organization_seq = #{organizationSeq} AND e.deleted_at IS NULL AND e.status = 'published' AND e.start_at IS NOT NULL AND e.start_at::date BETWEEN CURRENT_DATE AND CURRENT_DATE + INTERVAL '7 days'
UNION ALL
SELECT 'registration_closed' AS action_type ,'info' AS severity ,e.event_seq ,e.title ,'Registration has closed. Review the final participant list.' AS description ,e.registration_end_at AS due_at ,4 AS sort_order FROM event.events e WHERE e.organization_seq = #{organizationSeq} AND e.deleted_at IS NULL AND e.status = 'published' AND e.registration_end_at IS NOT NULL AND e.registration_end_at::date < CURRENT_DATE AND (e.start_at IS NULL OR e.start_at::date >= CURRENT_DATE)
UNION ALL
SELECT 'capacity_near_full' AS action_type ,'warning' AS severity ,e.event_seq ,e.title ,'Capacity is over 80%. Monitor registrations closely.' AS description ,NULL::timestamptz AS due_at ,5 AS sort_order FROM event.events e LEFT JOIN ( SELECT event_seq, COUNT(*) AS registration_count FROM event.event_participants WHERE status = 'registered' GROUP BY event_seq ) rc ON rc.event_seq = e.event_seq WHERE e.organization_seq = #{organizationSeq} AND e.deleted_at IS NULL AND e.status = 'published' AND e.max_participants IS NOT NULL AND e.max_participants > 0 AND COALESCE(rc.registration_count, 0)::numeric / e.max_participants >= 0.8 ) action_items ORDER BY sort_order ASC, due_at ASC NULLS LAST, event_seq DESC LIMIT 6

SELECT p.participant_seq ,ep.event_seq ,e.title AS event_title ,COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(CONCAT_WS(' ', p.first_name, NULLIF(p.middle_name, ''), p.last_name)), ''), p.email) AS full_name ,p.email ,p.organization_name ,p.position ,ep.registered_at AS registered_at FROM event.event_participants ep JOIN event.events e ON e.event_seq = ep.event_seq AND e.deleted_at IS NULL JOIN event.participants p ON p.participant_seq = ep.participant_seq WHERE e.organization_seq = #{organizationSeq} AND ep.status = 'registered' ORDER BY ep.registered_at DESC NULLS LAST, ep.event_participant_seq DESC LIMIT 5
